question: Which text asking about the weather appears in green serif font on a wooden background? A. What Did You do this Weekend? B. Was it Warm? C. Who needs to go all the way to Vail? D. Play Hard...

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person rides a sled down a curved luge track surrounded by snow and trees. A group of people in winter clothing stands together on a snowy hill near wooden benches. A dark vehicle drives along a winding paved road through a forest. Snow covers the ground and bare trees appear in the background of each outdoor scene.

Describe the sequence of visual events and text overlays presented throughout the video clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text asking about the weekend appears on a wooden background; at 2s, a person sleds down a curved track surrounded by snow; at 6s, a second question about warmth is displayed similarly; at 8s, a group stands near a ski jump ramp with location text; at 18s, a dark vehicle drives along a winding paved road through the snow.
